visual_narrative: Energetic cycling POV ranking of 3 street finds from worst to best. Opens with dramatic camera hook, then cycling through Valencia streets (Ruta Corts route). Countdown: 3rd place artificial plant, 2nd place office chair, 1st place wooden chest. Bridges between items use varied cycling clips from different barrios. Recap while cycling, CTA over street scenes, calm ending on bike path with palm trees.
available_scenes: stopping on bike path with palms (ruta-corts)
